24:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"invalidate"}]
25:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mark a memory as superseded by another."}]

27:["$","p",null,{"children":["Sets the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"superseded_by"}]," field on the target memory, signalling that it is no longer the canonical version. Pass a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"replacement_id"}]," to link to the new memory."]}]
28:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"sleep"}]
29:["$","p",null,{"children":"Run the sleep/consolidation cycle — groups working memories by source, summarizes them, promotes to episodic memory, and evicts originals."}]

52:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Module-Level Convenience Functions"}]
53:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne provides module-level functions that operate on a default instance:"}]
54:["$","$L5f",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import remember, recall, get_context, get_stats\nfrom mnemosyne import forget, update, sleep\nfrom mnemosyne import scratchpad_write, scratchpad_read, scratchpad_clear\n\n# These are equivalent to using Mnemosyne() with session_id=\"default\"\nremember(\"Some important fact\")\nresults = recall(\"important fact\")\n","language":"python"}]
55:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Hermes Plugin Tools"}]
56:["$","p",null,{"children":"When using Mnemosyne as a Hermes plugin, the following tools are exposed:"}]
57:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Tool"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_remember"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Store a new memory"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_recall"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Retrieve relevant memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_sleep"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Run the consolidation cycle"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_stats"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Get memory statistics"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_invalidate"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Mark a memory as superseded"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_triple_add"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Add a structured triple"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_triple_query"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Query the knowledge graph"}]]}]]}]]}]
